files.patch:
@@ -10,3 +10,13 @@
 - Wired the hotkey monitor into live recording, transcription, clipboard fallback delivery, overlay feedback, sound effects, and session tracing.
 - Added controller, transcriber, loader, overlay metadata, and audio-accumulator coverage and regenerated the Xcode project from `project.yml`.
 **Summary:** Delivered the walking skeleton as a working local dictation loop: the app boots as a menu bar utility, loads the configured Whisper model, records from the global hotkey, transcribes locally, copies the result to the clipboard with visible feedback, and returns to ready for the next session. During wrap-up, STORY-0034 was moved to ITER-0002 because its full live permission/settings reconfiguration scope exceeds the thinnest end-to-end skeleton.
+
+## ITER-0001
+
+**Completed:** 2026-04-09
+**Stories delivered:** STORY-0001, STORY-0002, STORY-0003, STORY-0004, STORY-0005, STORY-0006, STORY-0007, STORY-0008, STORY-0009, STORY-0010, STORY-0011, STORY-0012, STORY-0013, STORY-0014, STORY-0015, STORY-0016, STORY-0017, STORY-0018, STORY-0019, STORY-0020, STORY-0021, STORY-0022, STORY-0023, STORY-0024, STORY-0025, STORY-0026, STORY-0027, STORY-0028, STORY-0029, STORY-0030, STORY-0031, STORY-0223, STORY-0224, STORY-0225, STORY-0226, STORY-0227, STORY-0228, STORY-0229, STORY-0230, STORY-0231, STORY-0232, STORY-0233, STORY-0234, STORY-0235, STORY-0236, STORY-0237, STORY-0238, STORY-0239, STORY-0240, STORY-0241, STORY-0242, STORY-0243, STORY-0244, STORY-0246, STORY-0247, STORY-0248, STORY-0249, STORY-0251, STORY-0252, STORY-0255, STORY-0256, STORY-0257, STORY-0258, STORY-0259
+**Tasks executed:**
+- Replaced clipboard-only delivery with the accessibility-aware paste pipeline, including pasteboard preservation, simulated Command+V delivery, paste-session capture, and continuous paste-target monitoring.
+- Added hotkey monitor lifecycle controls for suspend/resume, clean stop, and idempotent start so shortcut capture can pause global input handling safely.
+- Wired successful paste snapshots into the post-paste learning seam, completed performance trace logging at paste end, and archived live recordings into the transcription-lab store as WAV plus JSON metadata/timings.
+**Summary:** Delivered the full accessibility paste path on top of the walking skeleton. Ghost Pepper now detects editable targets through direct accessibility queries plus a continuous fallback monitor, pastes via preserved clipboard + simulated Command+V when possible, falls back cleanly to copied text when not, logs a completed performance trace for delivered sessions, and archives each non-empty recording into the transcription-lab store for later replay.
